prompt: Zoom in on the current Safari page 3 times (Cmd+= three times, or cerebellum 'safari zoom_in 3'). After zooming, write the current page text zoom level to ~/Desktop/kinbench/095-zoom-level.txt (e.g. via JavaScript: document.body.style.zoom or window.devicePixelRatio; or just write 'zoomed-3' to the file).
